title: Certificate Management with kubeadm — kubeadm node initialization
text:
Once CSR files have been signed and required certificates are in place on the hosts
you want to use as nodes, you can use the commands
kubeadm init
and
kubeadm join
to create a Kubernetes cluster from these nodes. During
init
and
join
, kubeadm
uses existing certificates, encryption keys and kubeconfig files that it finds in the
/etc/kubernetes
tree on the host's local filesystem.
